name: ClaudeFather Dark
summary: A dark, high-contrast ClaudeFather palette + brand accents for the dashboard.
description: A tuned, low-eye-strain dark theme (deeper black, brighter gold, oxblood accent) for a control center you stare at all day. Cosmetic only -- no data access, no secrets. Install registers the palette; select it by setting theme: claudefather-dark in cc.config.
